import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    string.trim(s)
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      sum = sum + (b - 48)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print("digit_sum=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
